title: Questions from Quarantine: Demystifying COVID-19 Vaccines
summary: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine.
body: The Security and Global Health Project is proud to present a weekly web series with Security Mom Juliette Kayyem and Medicine Mom Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. Each week, our experts will answer your questions from quarantine and give you advice on staying sane and sanitary in a global crisis. We hope you'll join our Moms every Tuesday, and if you have a question that you want answered, tweet with #QuestionsFromQuarantine . _list.source: Belfer Center for Science and International Affairs, Harvard Kennedy School

result.main_content_en: The Security and Global Health Project hosts a weekly web series titled 'Questions from Quarantine,' featuring experts Juliette Kayyem and Dr. Margaret Bourdeaux. The series aims to address public inquiries related to the COVID-19 pandemic, offering guidance on maintaining mental and physical well-being during the global crisis. A specific focus is placed on demystifying COVID-19 vaccines, providing accessible explanations and advice. The initiative encourages public participation by inviting questions via social media using the hashtag #QuestionsFromQuarantine. The project is part of a broader effort to disseminate reliable public health information and foster community resilience.
result.main_content_zh: 安全与全球健康项目推出了每周网络系列节目“隔离问题”，由专家朱丽叶·凯耶姆和玛格丽特·布尔多博士主持。该系列旨在解答公众在新冠疫情期间提出的问题，就如何在全球危机中保持身心健康提供指导。节目特别关注对新冠疫苗的解惑释疑，提供易于理解的解释和建议。该倡议鼓励公众通过社交媒体使用标签#QuestionsFromQuarantine进行提问和参与。该项目是传播可靠公共卫生信息、增强社区韧性的更广泛努力的一部分。
